/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/qdock.dir/qdock_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qdock.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qdock.dir/src/x11util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qdock.dir/src/DockWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qdock.dir/src/DockItem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qdock.dir/src/ApplicationScanner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qdock.dir/src/SettingsDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qdock.dir/src/AppLauncher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qdock.dir/src/DockAnimation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qdock.dir/src/SystemTrayArea.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qdock.dir/src/TrashItem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qdock.dir/src/SeparatorItem.cpp.o -o qdock  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6DBus.so.6.4.2 -lX11 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2
